text:
r @0,0 1028x907
  rc1 @0,112 1028x3701
    rc1c1 @0,112 1028x24 "NL FR EN NL FR EN Internet + M..."
    rc1c2 @0,136 1028x3586
      rc1c2c1 [2x1] @0,136 1028x360 "Mobiel + internet met korting ..."
      rc1c2c2 @0,496 1028x472
        rc1c2c2c1 @30,520 968x16
        rc1c2c2c2 [2x1] @30,536 968x408 "Wat zoek je? Internet + mobiel..."
      rc1c2c3 @0,968 1028x56
        rc1c2c3c1 @30,968 968x16
        rc1c2c3c2 [bg:color] @30,984 968x40
          rc1c2c3c2c1 @40,984 948x8
          rc1c2c3c2c2 @40,992 948x24 "Liever geen vaste lijn? Dat ka..."
          rc1c2c3c2c3 @40,1016 948x8
      rc1c2c4 @0,1024 1028x166
        rc1c2c4c1 @30,1024 968x32
        rc1c2c4c2 [2x1] @30,1056 968x134 "Bespaar met onze webdeals Webd..."
      rc1c2c5 @0,1190 1028x552
        rc1c2c5c1 @30,1190 968x32
        rc1c2c5c2 [3x1] @30,1222 968x520 "INTERNET Onbeperkt internet nu..."
      rc1c2c6 @0,1742 1028x536
        rc1c2c6c1 @30,1742 968x32
        rc1c2c6c2 [2x1] @30,1774 968x504 "Speciaal voor Telenet-klanten ..."
      rc1c2c7 @0,2278 1028x1100
        rc1c2c7c1 @30,2302 968x84 "Op zoek naar inspiratie?"
        rc1c2c7c2 [2x2] @30,2386 968x832 "Is je kind klaar voor een eers..."
        rc1c2c7c3 @30,3218 968x32
        rc1c2c7c4 @30,3250 968x104
          rc1c2c7c4c1 @30,3250 968x52
          rc1c2c7c4c2 @30,3302 968x52 "Bekijk alle artikels"
      rc1c2c8 @0,3378 1028x344
        rc1c2c8c1 @30,3402 968x84 "Hoe kunnen we je helpen?"
        rc1c2c8c2 @30,3558 968x48
        rc1c2c8c3 [3x1] @30,3606 968x92 "Veelgestelde vragen Contacteer..."
    rc1c3 @0,3722 1028x91
  rc2 [bg:color] @0,3813 1028x668
    rc2c1 [4x3] @16,3833 996x575
      rc2c1c1 @16,4292 996x92
        rc2c1c1c1 @16,4308 996x28 "Vind ons ook op"
        rc2c1c1c2 @16,4336 996x48
      rc2c1c2 [6x1] @16,4384 996x24 "Voorwaarden Juridische info He..."
    rc2c2 @6,4408 1016x33 "© Telenet 2026 - Telenet BV - ..."
  rc3 @0,4481 1028x60
